title: Loop Complete
description: Emitted when an FSM loop finishes execution.

final_state.description: Name of the state at termination. Usually the last state entered; when terminated_by='timeout' this may be a state that was routed to but never entered — with one exception: if that pending state is a shell action, the executor flushes it (emits state_enter with flushed=true and runs its action) before honoring the timeout, so state_enter for final_state is always emitted before loop_complete (BUG-1226).

terminated_by.description: What caused loop termination (e.g. terminal_state, max_iterations)

error.description: Error message explaining why the loop crashed. Present only when terminated_by='error'.
